summary: Full backend and frontend testing of NxGenSports MVP. All critical flows tested: auth, school CRUD, invite flow (send/accept), dashboard, UserManagement. 18/18 backend tests passed, all frontend flows working.

minor.issue: seed_admin does NOT update existing admin password if already exists with correct hash - minor edge case only

allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True - this is a CORS misconfiguration; browsers reject wildcard origins with credentials. Should use explicit origins. Currently works because frontend doesn't use cookies.

issues: Super admin sidebar only shows 'Teams' and 'Settings' - no direct 'UserManagement' link. UserManagement is accessible only by direct URL. Consider adding a nav link.

action_items: Minor: Add 'UserManagement' link to super_admin sidebar navigation
Minor: Fix CORS config to use explicit origins instead of wildcard (currently harmless since no httpOnly cookies used)
critical_code_review_comments: CORS: allow_origins=['*'] + allow_credentials=True is invalid per browser specs. Use explicit origin list.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/login - brute force possible
No httpOnly cookie auth - using localStorage (acceptable for this app type but worth noting)
ParentPortal uses base44.asServiceRole which doesn't exist in apiClient.js - will throw error for parent users
seed_data_creation: Test school 'TEST UI School' and users testcoach@test.edu, uitestinvite@test.edu created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: First test run. Backend 100% pass. Frontend: Login, Dashboard, UserManagement (Schools/Users/Players/Master Teams tabs), Add School form, Invite send, Invite accept at /Login?invite_token=<token> all working correctly. Super admin sidebar only shows Teams+Settings (no UserManagement direct link). ParentPortal has a reference to base44.asServiceRole which doesn't exist in apiClient.js.
mocked_apis: Email sending for invites is MOCKED - invite URLs only logged to backend console, not actually emailed
